creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

when i try to start GNOME using an AMD RX 570 then it freezes directly at start. 
 
But if i tell Xorg to use the scfb driver (Software Rendering) then it works.

Tested with xf86-video-amdgpu and the modesetting driver from package + using drm-kmod from ports with FreeBSD 12.2-STABLE r369250.
